query: heavy fog mist obscured figure barely visible silhouette
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/fog_silhouette — anti_aesthetic — figures lost in mist, dissolved silhouettes, monochrome haze

response.objective_caption: A dark, central silhouetted form appears against a pale gray background. The shape has a rounded, bulky upper section that tapers toward one side, with a curved lower edge that creates an arched negative space near the bottom through which lighter background tone is visible. The image is presented entirely in shades of gray.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An intentionally blurred, monochrome image reduces a dark central form to an unrecognizable silhouetted mass lacking any fine detail or texture. Through extreme soft focus and a muted, desaturated palette of grays, edges and surfaces dissolve into mushy ambiguity, creating an abstract composition that abandons representational clarity in favor of pure shape and atmospheric softness.
